name: skill_invoked
description: Proves the project-local Claude Code skill at `.claude/skills/orders-helper/SKILL.md` was auto-discovered AND consulted. The user message is a realistic, content-triggered operator question. It names neither the skill nor the MCP server, so a green check tests skill *discovery and routing*, not the agent's ability to follow an explicit instruction. Triple-bound proof: (a) `skills_invoked: [orders-helper]` matches Claude Code's first-class Skill tool with `args.skill == "orders-helper"` (Tier 1 in skill_invoked helper), (b) the skill's mandated downstream MCP call `mcp__orders_db__get_order` with `order_id: 42` actually fired, (c) the skill's mandated reply marker `[via orders-helper]` is present on the final line.

turns.message: What's the status of order 42, and who's the customer? I also need the tracking number.
